name: enterprise-legal-ops
description: Local legal operations skill for small and medium-sized enterprises: contracts, HR, seals, licenses, governance, capital contributions, reminders, and local queries.

interface.shortDescription: 中小企业本地法务运营、台账与提醒
interface.longDescription: A local-first enterprise legal operations skill for SMEs, covering contracts, HR legal operations, seals, licenses, articles/governance authority, shareholder capital contributions, reminders, Feishu calendar reminder sync, and local natural-language queries.
defaultPrompt: 企业法务运营 帮我初始化企业内部法务工作区
